title: Glitch Anime Girls Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of various anime girls with a glitch effect.
body:
A fabricskybox sky overlay containing various anime girls. There are 6 total girls in the sky with a glitch effect overlayed over the entire thing. 

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will be unable to see it.**

![Girls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cf7b046ed42a44943557bb27bfeaecdd848a922_0.webp)
